name: aacyn dev
postCreateCommand: sudo apt-get update && sudo apt-get install -y build-essential clang llvm libbpf-dev libelf-dev zlib1g-dev linux-headers-generic make file && curl -fsSL https://bun.sh/install | bash && export BUN_INSTALL="$HOME/.bun" && export PATH="$BUN_INSTALL/bin:$PATH" && cd ts && bun install && cd ../native && make
